With 1.7m and offshore breeze, there'll be some ramps forming, hopefully nobody gets decapitated.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 3.0km/h ESE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 6.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.6m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
At 1.6m with that offshore, Ribeira might actually be rideable today; might even get a barrel before it closes out on me.
🌊 Swell: 1.6m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h ENE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 42.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
